vlm_note: Clean 8-piece opening (4 settlements + 4 roads), board fitted from empty_baseline (residual 0.99px); robber moved off desert onto h15 but no extra pieces built. Read from a 2x-upscaled vertex-id overlay. Colours per meta: ThePhantom=BLACK, TwinTree=GREEN. BOTH players' setup grant is {BRICK:1,WHEAT:1,WOOD:1}, so players are told apart by COLOUR, and the self-check is applied per-player. ThePhantom (BLACK): settlements v10=[2,3,10] and v8=[1,7,18] (roads v10-v14, v8-v9). TwinTree (GREEN): settlements v13=[3,11,12] and v4=[0,5,6] (roads v13-v37, v4-v19). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES per player: ThePhantom's grant {BRICK,WHEAT,WOOD} equals exactly v8 (WHE3+WOO8+BRI10) and NOT v10 (SHE6+ORE5+WHE12={SHEEP,ORE,WHEAT}); TwinTree's grant {BRICK,WHEAT,WOOD} equals exactly v4 (BRI11+WOO4+WHE9) and NOT v13 (ORE5+ORE9+ORE10={ORE:3}). Each grant matches EXACTLY ONE of that player's two settlements, pinning the 2nd (granting) settlement.
